title: Override Token
description: HMAC-SHA256-signed token authorizing a specific bypass of a specific hook rule. Issued only via scripts/sign_override.py (interactive). Single-use by default; max 4h TTL by default; hard ceilings 5 uses / 24h.

rule_id.description: PT-2, PT-6, G-2 are NOT in this enum: those rules have no override path

trace_id.description: Optional finding-id this override applies to (for PT-4/PoT-2/etc)

target.description: Specific target the override applies to: hostname, file path, package, etc.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this override is justified

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 (lowercase hex) of canonical JSON of all other fields, keyed by ~/.claude/sec-research-override-key
